segments: Handcrafted olive wood — every piece is unique
Free gift demo on orders over €150

home.heroLede: Every piece is different — the warmth of wood, natural grain, and craft. For your home, kitchen, and gifts that last.
home.storyP1: Olive wood keeps its beauty for a long time and stands up to daily use. We work with local wood and hand finishing to preserve the natural pattern and character of each piece.
home.storyP2: We specialise in unique home and kitchen pieces — from lamps and bowls to small accessories. Contact us for custom work or larger orders.
home.showcaseTitle: Every piece tells its own story — of wood, hands, and time.
home.showcaseLede: Bowls, serving boards, spoons, plates, candle holders, mortars — all carved from naturally fallen branches and trees of the Lun olive groves. No two pieces are alike.
home.ctaMuted: This is a demo form — no data is sent. Connect your email or newsletter service later.
home.newsletterDemoAlert: Demo — no data sent. Connect your newsletter later.

reviews.quote: A beautiful small piece, the wood is smoothly finished and you can feel it’s handmade. I recommend it.
reviews.author: Ana M.

reviews.quote: The bowl is exactly what I was looking for — warm wood colour and a unique grain pattern.
reviews.author: Marko P.

reviews.quote: Fast delivery, item as pictured. Thank you!
reviews.author: Ivana K.

reviews.quote: Bought as a gift — the recipient loved the quality.
reviews.author: Petra L.

reviews.quote: I love that it’s not a mass‑produced piece — the character of the wood shows.
reviews.author: Tomislav B.

reviews.quote: I use the boards every day; the wood is solid and easy to clean.
reviews.author: Maja S.

footer.muted: Olive wood pieces, handmade. Contact us for questions and orders.

shop.title: All products
shop.ledeDefault: Up to 200 unique olive wood items in thirteen categories. Images are examples (Unsplash); replace with your own photos in production.

collection.empty: There are no products in this collection yet.

about.title: Olivo Unikat
about.p1: We make and sell unique olive wood pieces — from lighting and tableware to small kitchen accessories and décor. Olive wood is dense and durable, and every piece has its own grain, so no two are alike.
about.p2: We aim to combine function (kitchen, table, gifts) with the warmth of natural material. For larger quantities, custom designs, or collaboration, use the Contact page.
about.p3: This site is a shop template: you can change text and images in the built‑in editor or in the source code.

contact.title: Contact
contact.p1: Replace this text with your email, phone, or forms you use in production for product, order, or partnership enquiries.
